dimensions.name: Governance Awareness
dimensions.rationale: The trace demonstrates perfect governance alignment. The rules-context-loader and alignment-engine steps both executed successfully and passed schema validation, ensuring that architectural decisions were made within the defined governance framework.

dimensions.name: Causal Reasoning Depth
dimensions.rationale: The architecture-work-to-evolution-map span shows an exceptionally high level of reasoning depth, evidenced by the 64,850 completion tokens generated. This indicates a granular analysis of how specific work items cause changes in the architectural state.

dimensions.name: Architectural Tension Analysis
dimensions.rationale: The flow correctly transitions from alignment (identifying gaps/tensions) to intent generation. While the resolution of trade-offs is implicit in the successful generation of the architecture intent document, the structured sequence confirms tension analysis was performed.
